overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked futuristic city at night. The scene features towering megabuildings, elevated highways, vibrant neon signage, and atmospheric haze typical of the cyberpunk genre.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade lined with palm trees

events.description: camera settles into third-person follow mode behind the player character with red hair

agents.ego_description: player character with red mohawk walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk

notable_agents.action: player character with distinctive red mohawk walking forward

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with support pillars spanning the street
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway along the water
concrete railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the water
towering futuristic megabuilding with illuminated windows and geometric facade
large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics on building facades

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a futuristic city street at night, then transitions to follow a character with red hair walking along a waterfront promenade. Palm trees line the left side while an elevated highway looms ahead. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated arched supports

events.description: entering the covered walkway with futuristic arched supports and accent lighting
passing under the glowing orange neon arches overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade section with illuminated structural arches

entered.detail: futuristic covered walkway with curved metal supports and warm orange accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway with distinctive arched supports illuminated by orange neon lights. The elevated highway now passes directly overhead, casting dramatic shadows. Digital billboards line the right side while the wet tiled floor reflects the ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk beneath overpass

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the megabuilding against the night sky

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk then pausing to look up at the towering structure

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the crosswalk intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the multi-lane street at a yellow-striped crosswalk, with vehicles passing by. Midway through, the camera tilts dramatically upward to showcase the immense scale of the megabuilding towering above the elevated highway. The scene emphasizes the verticality of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with dense digital signage

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the elevated highway overpass
passing under the thick concrete support structure of the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway past various pedestrians and illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: thick concrete pillars supporting the massive elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place under the elevated highway, where the lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric. The camera passes thick concrete support pillars and walks alongside a street lined with vertical digital billboards. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and the glow of neon signs reflects off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked futuristic city, transitioning from an open waterfront promenade into the oppressive verticality of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins by following a red-haired character along a palm-lined walkway where wet pavement reflects the glow of surrounding buildings and a looming elevated highway. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered walkway defined by orange neon arched supports and dramatic shadows cast by the highway passing directly overhead. The camera then follows the character across a yellow-striped crosswalk before tilting sharply upward to reveal the immense scale of a megabuilding towering over the cityscape. Finally, the perspective descends back to street level to move beneath the highway's concrete pillars, passing vertical digital billboards and other pedestrians amidst the dark, atmospheric glow of the city.
